title: Donni Bratz
content:
{{Top|fga|leg}} {{Character |type= |image= |name=Donni Bratz |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species= |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|You ''said'' I could have a turn after you. You ''said''. And that was four credits ago."
"Don't be a pest, Meatface."
"Mom said you weren't supposed to call me that."
"Well, Meatface, Mom isn't here, is she?|Donni Bratz asking his brother Chuck for a round of [[Wookiee Warpath]]|''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]''}} '''Donni Bratz''' was a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] being who lived during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]], he went on a trip with his brother, [[Chuck Bratz]], aboard the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] ''[[Reasonable Doubt]]''. At one point of this journey, they both played the game [[Wookiee Warpath]], which resulted in a dispute over who of them would be the first to have a turn. They came to the compromise that Donni would play directly after his brother's first game. However, Chuck broke the engagement and denied all requests for a round of Wookiee Warpath. After the fourth game, [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]]—hidden in an [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2 unit]]—entered the room and stole a drink Chuck had bought to refresh himself during the match. Donni tried to warn him, but Yoda used a [[Mind trick/Legends|mind trick]] to make him forget that he was stealing the drink. ==Biography== Donni Bratz was born as a member of a [[Species/Legends|species]] with four [[Limb/Legends|thumbs]] and [[Antenna/Legends|antennae]] on the head. One day, Donni violated his bigger brother [[Chuck Bratz|Chuck's]] authority and, as a punishment, he was tied to a [[zink-sled]]. Traumatized by this experience, he respected his brother's authority henceforward. In [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]], Donni went on a trip with his brother Chuck aboard the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] ''[[Reasonable Doubt]]''. At one point, he and his brother went to the gaming establishment [[Kidz Arkade]] in order to play the game [[Wookiee Warpath]]. Since both liked the game, there was a dispute over who would play the first round. Donni finally gave in when his brother promised him that he could play directly after him. However, Chuck continued playing round by round and denied Donni's requests for a match. [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]]—who had hidden himself in an [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2 unit]] to avoid being identified on his [[Mission to Vjun (Clone Wars)|secret mission]]—entered the Kidz Arkade after Chuck's fourth consecutive game and stole Chuck's drink which he had bought prior to the match. Donni tried to warn his brother of the thief, but Chuck ignored him because he thought he would ask again for a match. In the next moment, the Jedi Master used a [[Mind trick/Legends|mind trick]] to make Donni forget that he was stealing his brother's drink. ==Personality and traits== Donni Bratz's opinion about his brother was divided. He admired his brother's skills in Wookiee Warpath and furthermore, his [[Mother Bratz|mother]] often reminded him that Chuck was "the best big brother a guy could have." Contrary to his mother's words, he usually feared him. Chuck had once tied him to a zink-sled, when Donni had violated his authority. ==Behind the scenes== Donni Bratz's only appearance to date was in the [[2004]] novel ''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'' written by [[Sean Stewart]]. In the story, he plays a minor character who only appeared on a few pages. ==Appearances== *''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'' {{Ab|Yoda: Dark Rendezvous (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Donni Bratz }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Bratz, Donni}} [[Category:Individuals of unidentified species]] [[Category:Males]]
